title: To redesignate certain facilities at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park in honor of Congressman Bill Pascrell, Jr.
plain_summary: This bill changes the names of two places at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park in New Jersey. The Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge will be renamed the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. The Overlook Park will be renamed Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park. These changes honor Congressman Bill Pascrell, Jr. by adding his name to these park areas.
last_action_text: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources Subcommittee on National Parks. Hearings held.

sections.title: Section 1  Redesignation of Paterson Great Falls NHP Facilities
sections.text: Part A says that the Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park will now be called the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. Part B says that Overlook Park at Paterson Great Falls National Historical Park will now be called Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park. Part C says that anywhere in United States laws, maps, rules, documents, papers, or other official records that mentions the Great Falls Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge, it will now mean the Bill Pascrell, Jr. Scenic Overlook Trail Bridge. The same rule applies to Overlook Park, which will now mean Bill Pascrell, Jr. Overlook Park in all official records.
